context: Evaluates the implementation of affordabot's three health-check endpoints. Checks that each endpoint calls the correct affordabot services, returns the correct shape, and handles failure modes with proper status values.

checklist.name: Root health shape
checklist.description: GET /health returns JSON with keys status, database, and zai_research; database reflects PostgresDB.is_connected() result.

checklist.name: Jurisdictions health loop
checklist.description: GET /health/jurisdictions iterates SCRAPERS and calls check_health() on each scraper instance, mapping the boolean result to 'healthy'/'unhealthy'.

checklist.name: Analysis health LLM check
checklist.description: GET /health/analysis calls ZaiClient.validate_api_key() and reflects the result in details.llm ('connected' vs 'error').

checklist.name: Degraded status on LLM failure
checklist.description: When validate_api_key() returns False, the overall status is 'degraded', not 'healthy' or 'unhealthy'.

checklist.name: Exception handling
checklist.description: GET /health/analysis catches exceptions and returns status 'unhealthy' with an error field instead of raising an HTTP 500.
